Okay, what's up everybody? This video is talking about the scientific background or what would be the formulation of the men's multivitamin or aka bulletproof vitality product. The reason that it was made is to fill in the nutritional gaps that most men typically have within their diets and to really act as a pairing with the test storm product because there's a lot, you know, when you increase testosterone a lot, there are also downstream effects that we wanted to counteract. So this product kind of works hand in hand with that product. And so there's two sort of like life extending type things that Dr. Perkesio talked about. And then the third is directly in response to the test storm products, which is all around managing your prostate. So we will get into it. So one thing that I do want to bring up in terms of men and nutritional deficiencies is that men almost never have any. So men eat a lot and they eat a lot all the time. So to be completely honest, there weren't a whole lot of gaps to fill in terms of actual nutrients, which is why the name bulletproof vitality is so apropos because this is about quality of life, not because you're not eating enough of the right types of foods. And so there are two specific blends in here that were made specifically for quality of life purposes. And one is really just this, the longevity blend, live forever. And there's two ingredients that are legitimate dosages, the curcumin and the ubiquinone that really help with what is called mitochondrial health for long term oxidative damage or lack thereof in this case. And curcumin, which has amazing what are called pleiotropic anti-inflammatory effects. And pleiotropic is a fancy word for it, just does a ton of crap that's good for you. It's really what it comes down to. And so for quality of life purposes, no, technically speaking, it's not a nutrient, but it does so much good stuff. That is why it's essential for vitality. So I just wanted to get that out of the way. There's good stuff like the bromelain for inflammation and boron for helping with testosterone production. So these things are essential for quality of life purposes. Then the next, the next proprietary blend is really quite essentially for prostate health. Saupalmetto, Surnilton, Pygium, Lycopene, really these things are meant for prostate health and helping with possible effects of BPH because if you make some testosterone, that testosterone is going to get converted to other stuff, mainly things like possibly DHT. And that can cause your prostate to swell up a little bit and we're just preventing that. So the, the, the symptom that we're trying to help prevent is if you ever had like difficulty peeing or something like that, sometimes that can be caused by an enlarged or inflamed prostate, which can be caused by excess in testosterone, which got converted to DHT. And so we're just trying to jump there before anything even happens anyways. And that's why these go hand in hand. So consider this the, the less, the less sexy friend of Testorm, but, but still necessary. So yes, take it, enjoy, live longer and have a higher quality of life.
